creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 209317
dnsdist upgrade to 1.4.0

Hello,

Earlier today 1.4.0 was released.
The simple patch should work fine - I tested it with poudriere against 11.3 and 12.0 / both amd64.

The less simple patch is actually work from before, where I wished to run multiple daemons, and adjusted the rc script to allow me to do so.
However, I don't know if what I'm trying to accomplish is done right.
That patch was made agains a RC version, so should not be applied, but could be used as example.

Leo
